expectations.text: 伺服器在 3001 port 確認已啟動或成功啟動
expectations.evidence: summary.md: 'Already running, reused existing server, no startup needed' — 透過 netstat 確認 PID 21136 在監聽
summary.md step 2: 'Redirected to /, title "首頁 - 花漾生活", Admin nav visible.'
summary.md step 3: 'Verified on /cart: item present, nav badge showed "購物車 1"'

expectations.text: 結帳後成功跳轉到 ECPay 付款頁面
expectations.evidence: summary.md step 4: 跳轉到 https://payment-stage.ecpay.com.tw/Cashier/AioCheckOut/V5,訂單編號 ORD2026061707079

expectations.text: 正確選擇「網路ATM」(WebATM)而非「ATM虛擬帳號」
expectations.evidence: summary.md step 5: 'Selected the "WebATM" listitem ... confirmed this is the correct one vs. the separate "ATM" / "ATM虛擬帳號" option, per the skill's table.'

expectations.text: 銀行選擇「台灣土地銀行」
expectations.evidence: summary.md step 5: 'selected "台灣土地銀行"' 且最終訂單頁確認 payment method 為網路ATM/台灣土地銀行

expectations.text: 正確處理 ECPay 提醒彈窗(僅點關閉,未對前往付款重複點擊導致 timeout)
expectations.evidence: summary.md step 6 與 Errors 區塊第1點: 'Per the skill's guidance, clicked only "關閉" (did NOT click "前往付款" a second time)... worked perfectly'

expectations.text: 最終訂單狀態顯示「已付款」
expectations.evidence: summary.md Final Order Details: 'Final order status: 已付款 (Paid), confirmed both on the page and by directly querying the SQLite orders table (status: "paid")'

expectations.text: 整個流程沒有發生未解決的錯誤或需要多次重試才能繼續
expectations.evidence: summary.md: 'No retries were needed for any step; every click/navigation succeeded on the first attempt.'
